meaning: n.俚语,行话v.用粗话骂,用俚语说
examples: Archie liked to think he kept up with current slang.
The manual is full of the jargon and slang of self-improvement courses.
He tends to use a lot of slang expressions that I've never heard before.
American Slang will stream here in its entirety until its release on June 15.
Beneath the big, galloping fun of American Slang lies a unifying theme about the fleeting nature of youth.
